zh.lifeSummary: 當Tangwystl Verch Daffyd於1227年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾特雷費格爾斯時，她的父親Dafydd Goch ap Hywell37歲，母親Perwyr verch Maredudd35歲。她於1245年與Howel Gruffydd在英國威爾斯丹比爾結婚。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tangwystl Verch Daffyd于1227年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾特雷費格爾斯时，她的父亲Dafydd Goch ap Hywell37岁，母亲Perwyr verch Maredudd35岁。她于1245年与Howel Gruffydd在英国威尔斯丹比爾结婚。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Daffyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Irish: from Ó Deabhthaigh, a personal name based on deabhthach ‘quarrelsome’.

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Tangwystl Verch Daffyd was born in 1227, in Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Dafydd Goch ap Hywell, was 37 and her mother, Perwyr verch Maredudd, was 35. She married Howel Gruffydd in 1245, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tangwystl Verch Daffyd est née en 1227, à Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Dafydd Goch ap Hywell, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Perwyr verch Maredudd, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Howel Gruffydd en 1245, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tangwystl Verch Daffyd 1227 in Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dafydd Goch ap Hywell 37 und ihre Mutter Perwyr verch Maredudd 35. Sie hat 1245 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom Howel Gruffydd geheiratet. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

ht.Cilcen, Denbighshire, , Wales: Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tangwystl Verch Daffyd è nata il nel 1227 nel Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, Dafydd Goch ap Hywell, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Perwyr verch Maredudd, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Howel Gruffydd nel 1245, nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Tangwystl Verch Daffydが1227年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアトレフエグルウイスで生まれた時，父Dafydd Goch ap Hywellは37歳，母Perwyr verch Mareduddは35歳であった。1245年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでHowel Gruffyddと結婚した。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tangwystl Verch Daffyd(이)가 1227년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 트레페그w이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd Goch ap Hywell(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Perwyr verch Maredudd(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Howel Gruffydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mg.Cilcen, Denbighshire, , Wales: Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tangwystl Verch Daffyd nasceu em 1227, em Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Dafydd Goch ap Hywell, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Perwyr verch Maredudd, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Howel Gruffydd em 1245, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tangwystl Verch Daffyd родилась в 1227 г. в местности трефеглвис, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Dafydd Goch ap Hywell было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Perwyr verch Maredudd, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Howel Gruffydd в 1245 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tangwystl Verch Daffyd nació en 1227, en Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Dafydd Goch ap Hywell, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Perwyr verch Maredudd, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Howel Gruffydd en 1245, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió en su pueblo.
